assertions.scriptName: unbounded varchar primary key preserves rows
bytea primary key supports equality lookup
"char" high-bit byte casts to signed integer
DROP TYPE dependency checks use schema-qualified type identity
assertions.query:
SELECT n.nspname, t.typname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
						WHERE n.nspname IN ('drop_type_schema_a', 'drop_type_schema_b')
							AND t.typname = 'same_named_enum'
						ORDER BY n.nspname;

assertions.scriptName: DROP TYPE dependency checks use schema-qualified type identity
DROP TYPE rejects typed table dependency
DROP TYPE rejects typed table dependency
assertions.query:
SELECT c.reloftype = t.oid
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_type t ON t.typname = 'typed_drop_dependency_row'
						WHERE c.relname = 'typed_drop_dependency_items';

assertions.scriptName: DROP TYPE rejects typed table dependency
DROP TYPE rejects function signature dependencies
DROP TYPE CASCADE works without dependents
assertions.query:
SELECT t.typname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
						WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
							AND t.typname = 'drop_type_cascade_unused';

assertions.scriptName: xid ORDER BY requires ordering operator
assertions.query: SELECT id, x FROM xid_order_items ORDER BY x;

assertions.scriptName: internal "char" casts high-bit bytes to signed integers
regtype literal exposes regtype result type

assertions.query:
SELECT id, amount
						FROM numeric_pk_items
						WHERE id = 123.45
						ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: numeric typmod default write paths coerce stored values

assertions.query: SELECT id, label, length(label) FROM varchar_trailing_space_items;
SELECT id, label, length(label) FROM character_trailing_space_items;

assertions.scriptName: varchar typmod default truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT label, length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM varchar_default_trailing_space_items;

assertions.scriptName: character typmod default truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT label = 'abc'::CHARACTER(3), octet_length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM character_default_trailing_space_items;

assertions.scriptName: character typmod ignores trailing spaces for uniqueness
character typmod ignores trailing spaces for uniqueness
varchar array typmod truncates trailing spaces
varchar array_cat reports assignment typmod error
varchar array_cat reports assignment typmod error

assertions.query:
SELECT labels::text, octet_length(labels[2]), labels[2] = 'ab '::CHARACTER(3)
						FROM character_array_append_typmod_items;

SELECT labels::text, octet_length(labels[1]), labels[1] = 'ab '::CHARACTER(3)
						FROM character_array_prepend_typmod_items;

assertions.scriptName: character array_cat resolves typmod array arguments
assertions.query:
SELECT labels::text, octet_length(labels[2]), labels[2] = 'ab '::CHARACTER(3)
						FROM character_array_cat_typmod_items;

assertions.scriptName: character array typmod stores padded elements
character array typmod stores padded elements
character typmod array distinct uses element equality
varchar typmod array distinct uses element equality
numeric typmod array distinct uses element equality
typmod array group by uses element equality
varchar typmod array WHERE predicate uses element equality
varchar typmod array ORDER BY uses element ordering
character array typmod ignores trailing spaces for uniqueness
character array typmod ignores trailing spaces for uniqueness
character typmod literal cast pads to declared length
character typmod literal cast pads to declared length
character typmod column cast pads to declared length
assertions.query:
SELECT octet_length(CAST(label AS CHARACTER(3)))
						FROM character_column_cast_items;

numeric typmod rounds and rejects overflow

numeric negative scale rounds stored values
numeric scale greater than precision rounds stored values

array_to_string handles null array with null replacement

SELECT int_span::text, num_span::text, date_span::text
						FROM range_round_trip_items;
